families.note: promoted: unchanged direct consumers of a surviving former representation; rename/move/full-adoption/compat-adapter negatives hold
promoted: loop structure lost plus flatten-family gain; the semantic axis stays an explicit per-finding gap and every finding requests a metamorphic independence test
promoted: assertion-bearing gates whose syntactic reference closure terminates at the retired owner; closure is leaf-name expansion, never resolution proof
promoted: unchanged verifiers still requiring removed schema tokens; coherent migrations hold as negatives
promoted: retired config keys still carried by an acceptance surface; unknown dynamic uses suppress promotion
promoted: formerly bound consumers re-deriving through a lossy operation without the new evidence; whether the loss matters stays an explicit behavioral-oracle gap

promoted with standing caveat: the telemetry-surface classification is lexical supporting evidence recorded as a partial-capability gap on every finding; the firing condition is the dependency-path split
promoted: unchanged tests exercising the former representation, including singleton oracles after a scope collapse; reports what remains unproved, never that the implementation is wrong
promoted with standing caveat: cost and safe reuse are unproved without profiling or effect facts and stay an explicit per-finding gap

promoted with standing caveat: the status-surface classification is lexical supporting evidence recorded as a partial-capability gap on every finding; the firing condition is the dependency-path split
promoted: summary emitted only when several families share one owner migration, kept out of findings so baselines and severity counts never double-count
promoted: fail-loud sibling gates share bounded domain fields but differ by a zero-observation NaN carve-out or a high-overlap predicate feature set; low-overlap and aligned gates remain negative
